title: Hiring Category Manager at Flipkart Global Group

jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Flipkart Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Global Group has an exciting opening for a Category Manager at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Flipkart Global Group:
Flipkart Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Global Group!
